question: Looking at the revenue trend from 1924 to 2024, what is a key limitation when trying to interpret the changes between 1990 and 2000?

options.A: The plotted line between 1990 and 2000 is so small that it is hard to judge detailed changes in revenue during that period.
options.B: Revenue clearly increased steadily every year from 1990 to 2000.
options.C: Revenue clearly decreased overall from 1990 to 2000.
options.D: Revenue stayed exactly the same in every year from 1990 to 2000.

explanation: Revenue spiked between 1990 and 2000 then declined. Small chart elements can obscure the spike and subsequent fall.
